hero.title: Your Complete Women's Health
hero.description: EmpowerHer is your trusted partner in women's health, offering personalized tracking, AI-powered insights, and access to government schemes - all in one beautiful, easy-to-use app.

features.title: Everything You Need for Better Health
features.description: Comprehensive features designed specifically for women's health and wellness needs

cycle.title: Cycle Tracking
cycle.description: Track your menstrual cycle, predict ovulation, and understand your body's patterns

mood.title: Mood & Mental Wellness
mood.description: Monitor your emotional well-being and get AI-powered insights into mood patterns

pregnancy.title: Pregnancy Care
pregnancy.description: Track your pregnancy journey with weekly updates and personalized health tips

nutrition.title: Nutrition Tracking
nutrition.description: Log meals, track calories, and get personalized nutrition advice

schemes.title: Government Schemes
schemes.description: Discover and apply for government schemes you're eligible for

ai.title: AI Health Assistant
ai.description: Get instant answers to your health questions from our AI-powered assistant

benefits.title: Why Choose EmpowerHer?
benefits.description: We're committed to providing you with the best women's health experience possible
benefits.personalized: Personalized health insights based on your unique needs
benefits.free_to_use: Completely free to use, no hidden charges

testimonials.title: What Women Are Saying
testimonials.description: Join thousands of women who trust EmpowerHer for their health journey
testimonials.priya: EmpowerHer has completely changed how I track my health. The AI insights are incredibly helpful!
testimonials.anjali: I love that I can access government schemes directly through the app. So convenient!
testimonials.sunita: The pregnancy tracking feature gave me peace of mind during my entire journey.

cta.title: Start Your Health Journey Today
cta.description: Join thousands of women taking control of their health with EmpowerHer

footer.description: Empowering women with technology for better health and wellness.
